Star Real Estate

Where smart moves shine

A full-service AI-Driven brokerage firm specializing in the buying, selling, and leasing of residential and commercial properties, with a strong focus on the listing, marketing, and repositioning. Whether representing individual units or entire buildings in NYC, our team is committed to achieving optimal results.

New Development

Shaping New Developments. Driving NYC Sales.

For the past decade, we have specialized in NYC new development, with a focus on strategic marketing and sales for developers and property owners. Our experience and market-driven approach have helped position and successfully launch projects across New York City.
